profile.name: Matvei Anoshin
profile.bio: I’m Matvei Anoshin — a final year student of BSc program at the Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology (MIPT) with 3+ years’ experience in Machine Learning and Quantum Computing ✨. I combine a strong background in physics with hands-on expertise in ML and AI, gained through projects at EEML-2025, AIRI-2025 and SMILES-2024. I’m a Gold Medalist 🥇 of the All-Russian Student Physicists’ Tournament 2025 and a Semifinalist of the International Physicists’ Tournament (IPT) 2024, and I focus on scientific research for practical applications in emerging technologies.

links.title: Happy to share that I’ve been selected as a participant for SLT-2026! See you in Armenia 🇦🇲
Eager to tell that recently I helped in preparing school students for All-Russian Olympiad in AI at Sirius Educational Centre
Proud to announce that I’ve been selected as a participant and poster presenter at EEML-2025! See you in Bosnia 🇧🇦
Happy to share that I’ve won the Audience Award for my poster at the AIRI-2025 Summer School!
